name: Wrapped Avant+ DeFi Yield
redeem:
Withdrawals are request-based via the Bracket platform. Requests
  must be submitted prior to 18:00 UTC and typically process on a T+1
  schedule (available 1 day later, plus approximately 2 hours for
  processing).
notes:
Non-rebasing wrapped version of the rebasing bravUSDC token,
  designed for external lending market compatibility. The underlying strategy
  deploys USDC into the Avant ecosystem and other yield sources, carrying a
  higher risk profile (often leveraging assets). It has a 1.5% total TVL fee
  (1.0% Bracket platform, 0.5% Boreal management) and a 20% performance fee
  above high-water mark.
